title: Master Testcontainers
description: Architect ephemeral, Docker-based test environments using Testcontainers for various services like PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka. Ensure environmental parity between local development and CI pipelines using containerized test environments.
objectives: Architect ephemeral, Docker-based test environments using Testcontainers for various services like PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka.
Ensure environmental parity between local development and CI pipelines using containerized test environments.
